latest_release.name: Version 2.3.0
latest_release.body:
- Fix `--skip-update-check` in admin context [[#508](https://github.com/wp-cli/extension-command/pull/508)]
- Add --slug option to plugin/theme install for custom directory naming [[#506](https://github.com/wp-cli/extension-command/pull/506)]
- Regenerate README file [[#504](https://github.com/wp-cli/extension-command/pull/504)]
- Fix plugin deactivation during force install with explicit --activate flag [[#500](https://github.com/wp-cli/extension-command/pull/500)]
- Fix `--all --network` to network-activate single-site active plugins [[#499](https://github.com/wp-cli/extension-command/pull/499)]
- Fix newly reported PHPStan issues [[#498](https://github.com/wp-cli/extension-command/pull/498)]
- Add `--force` flag to plugin activate to re-run activation hooks [[#496](https://github.com/wp-cli/extension-command/pull/496)]
- Add `--auto-update-indicated` flag to `plugin update` and `theme update` commands [[#495](https://github.com/wp-cli/extension-command/pull/495)]
- Display extension names during bulk updates [[#492](https://github.com/wp-cli/extension-command/pull/492)]
- Pass correct variable to `requirements_not_met` [[#489](https://github.com/wp-cli/extension-command/pull/489)]
- Regenerate README file [[#488](https://github.com/wp-cli/extension-command/pull/488)]
- Do not scaffold _s theme in test [[#487](https://github.com/wp-cli/extension-command/pull/487)]
- Support installing plugins from single PHP file URLs [[#486](https://github.com/wp-cli/extension-command/pull/486)]
- Regenerate README file [[#485](https://github.com/wp-cli/extension-command/pull/485)]
- Support WordPress.org plugin/theme directory URLs in install commands [[#483](https://github.com/wp-cli/extension-command/pull/483)]
- Add missing documentation for `is-active` subcommands [[#482](https://github.com/wp-cli/extension-command/pull/482)]
- Add warning in `wp plugin is-active` for missing plugin files still in active_plugins [[#480](https://github.com/wp-cli/extension-command/pull/480)]
- Mock more HTTP requests in wporg status test [[#478](https://github.com/wp-cli/extension-command/pull/478)]
- Add type field to distinguish block themes from classic themes [[#477](https://github.com/wp-cli/extension-command/pull/477)]
- Add check-update commands for plugins and themes [[#475](https://github.com/wp-cli/extension-command/pull/475)]
- Include broken themes in `wp theme list` [[#473](https://github.com/wp-cli/extension-command/pull/473)]
- Display unexpected plugin output during activation with --debug [[#471](https://github.com/wp-cli/extension-command/pull/471)]
- Add plugin dependencies support with --with-dependencies flag and install-dependencies command [[#469](https://github.com/wp-cli/extension-command/pull/469)]
- Mock HTTP requests in wporg status tests [[#467](https://github.com/wp-cli/extension-command/pull/467)]
